ats_utilities.splasher.property.isplash_property module¶

Module

isplash_property.py

Info

Defines abstract class ISplashProperty with method(s). Interface for checking splash screen property.

class ats_utilities.splasher.property.isplash_property.ISplashProperty[source]¶

Bases: IContextSupport, ABC

Defines abstract class ISplashProperty with method(s). Interface for checking splash screen property. Note: Splash screen property comes from info configuration file as read only data.

It defines:

methods:
splash_keys - Property methods for set/get splash keys.
validates - Validates splash keys.
__str__ - Returns the splash keys as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract property splash_keys: Mapping[str, Any]¶

Property method for getting splash keys. Note: Splash screen property comes from info configuration file as read only data.

Returns:

Formatted splash screen property in Mapping format (read only data).

Return type:

<Mapping[str, Any]>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract validates() → bool[source]¶

Validates splash keys. Note: Splash screen property comes from info configuration file as read only data.

Returns:

True (success) else False (fail).

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.
